project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite board game app
verification_instructions: Run npx vite build and verify 0 errors
environment_constraints: No test runner. Validation is build-only.
key_patterns: Icons are exported from src/components/Icons.tsx (HonorIcon, CoinIcon, etc). CSS is in a single minified src/App.css. i18n translations in src/i18n/en.ts and src/i18n/es.ts.
directory_structure: src/components/ has all React components, src/types/game.ts has game data, src/i18n/ has translations, src/App.css has all styles (minified).
